name: Brown Sugar Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and dry strawberries, but do not hull.
2. Place strawberries in serving bowl.
3. Place yogurt in one bowl and brown sugar in another bowl.
4. To eat, dip each strawberry into the yogurt, then into the brown sugar.
5. Makes 12 servings.
Source: Betty Crocker Holidays
